_comment: Container config for the Baget agent group. Mounts the baget-mcp tools (built into this fork's container/agent-runner) and threads the per-(user, company) channel token + company id from OneCLI / agent-group settings. Adjust BAGET_API_BASE_URL via /customize for staging vs prod.
_provider_note: Agent-runner LLM provider. 'gemini' uses @google/genai and reads GOOGLE_GENERATIVE_AI_API_KEY (falling back to GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY) from env. Other options: 'mock' for offline smoke and 'claude' for the legacy SDK path.

env._BAGET_CHANNEL_TOKEN_note: Injected by OneCLI from the agent vault (credential: baget-channel-token). Each agent has its own scoped token tied to (user_id, company_id, conversation_id). Revoking from the dashboard immediately invalidates writes.
env._BAGET_COMPANY_ID_note: Set per-agent-group from the founder's selected company at pairing time. Stored in agent_groups.container_config and re-injected on every spawn.

mcp_servers.name: baget
mcp_servers._comment: baget-mcp lives in container/agent-runner/src/mcp-tools/baget.ts and is registered automatically by the barrel import. No separate MCP server process — the same container/agent-runner stdio transport carries baget tools alongside core/scheduling/interactive/agents.
